title: cannabaceae
intro: The Cannabaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as hemp and cannabis families. It is a group of approximately 11 to 13 genera, including Cannabis, Humulus, and Cannabis's closest relatives. The Cannabaceae family is primarily composed of herbaceous plants with dioecious reproductive systems, where male and female plants are separate. The family is native to the Northern Hemisphere, with a distribution that spans across Europe, Asia, and North America.
